title: Westminster Shorter Catechism — Quarterly
description: Read the Westminster Shorter Catechism over 13 weeks — roughly 8 questions per week.

days.label: Week 1 (Q1–8)
days.desc: Man's chief end, Scripture, and God

days.label: Week 2 (Q9–16)
days.desc: God's decrees, creation, and the fall

days.label: Week 3 (Q17–24)
days.desc: Man's misery, covenant of grace, Christ the mediator

days.label: Week 4 (Q25–33)
days.desc: Christ's offices — prophet, priest, and king

days.label: Week 6 (Q41–48)
days.desc: Benefits of redemption — justification and adoption

days.label: Week 7 (Q49–56)
days.desc: Sanctification and the means of grace

days.label: Week 10 (Q73–80)
days.desc: Prayer and the Lord's Prayer — first petitions

days.label: Week 11 (Q81–88)
days.desc: The Lord's Prayer continued — final petitions and doxology

days.label: Week 13 (Q97–107)
days.desc: The commandments continued — sin and grace
